_meta.description: Nepal public / government holidays — corrected per MoHA schedule. Removed: Mata Tirtha Aunshi (not govt holiday), Teej (women's observance only), Haribodhi Ekadashi, Vivah Panchami, Saraswati Puja (education institutes only). Split Holi into Pahadma/Terai. Added Maghi Parwa, Women's Day, Udhauli Parwa, Christmas. v1.2: Added Labour Day (May 1).
_meta.notes: Regional jatras and sub-days already covered by Dashain/Tihar ranges are excluded.
